productDisplayName: Puma Women Core Beach Beige Bag
description: Style Note puma combines style with utility in their range of handbags. With a dash of colour, innovative shapes and designs which follow fashion trends, this accessory will complete your outfit. Don't miss out on this must-have bag for the season! Product Details A big earthy tote bag in beige with purple highlights, has a purple print in the front along with the Puma cat appliqué Two purple twill tape straps extending to a design in the front and back One main compartment with an internal zipped pocket and internal open organiser pockets One concealed zipped pocket in the front Material and Care 55% jute and 45% cotton Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent Size Height: 36 cm Width: 57 cm Depth: 29 cm
